source_rationale: CD69 is an early T/NK cell activation marker, indicating activated lymphocytes
KLRB1 (CD161) is a marker of NK cells and NKT cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is highly expressed by effector T cells and NK cells
Granzyme B is a cytotoxic granule protein characteristic of NK cells and cytotoxic T lymphocytes
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule-associated gene expressed in NK and cytotoxic T cells
IL7R (CD127) marks T lymphocytes, particularly memory and tissue-resident T cells
CD3E is a core component of the T cell receptor complex, confirming T cell identity
Interferon-gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells and NK cells
CD7 is a pan-T/NK cell marker expressed on lymphoid lineage cells
CST7 (cystatin F) is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes and supports NK/CTL identity
Alpha-crystallin A is a lens-specific protein, indicating lens epithelial/fiber cells
Beta-crystallin B2 is a major structural protein of the ocular lens
Gamma-crystallin S is expressed in lens fiber cells
FOXE3 is a transcription factor essential for lens development and differentiation
PROX1 is a transcription factor critical for lens fiber cell differentiation
GJA8 (connexin 50) is a gap junction protein specific to lens fiber cells
HES5 is a Notch target gene involved in lens and retinal progenitor maintenance
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in lens epithelial cells for water transport
CD74 (invariant chain) is highly expressed in antigen-presenting B cells
MS4A1 (CD20) is a definitive B cell lineage marker
CD79A is a B cell receptor signaling component and canonical B cell marker
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in B cells and APCs
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
IRF8 is a transcription factor important for B cell and dendritic cell development
LINC00926 is a long non-coding RNA associated with B cell identity
CD37 is a tetraspanin predominantly expressed on mature B cells
Keratin 3 is a cornea-specific keratin marking differentiated corneal epithelial cells
Keratin 12 is the paired corneal epithelium-specific keratin
MAL is expressed in differentiated epithelial cells of the cornea
Claudin 4 is a tight junction protein of differentiated epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific transcription factor important in corneal epithelium
Desmoplakin is a desmosomal component of stratified epithelial cells
Keratin 5 marks basal epithelial cells in stratified epithelia
LY6D is expressed in corneal and conjunctival epithelial cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed by corneal/scleral stromal fibroblasts (keratocytes)
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/mesenchymal cell marker
Collagen type I alpha 2 is a major extracellular matrix gene of fibroblasts
Fibulin 1 is an ECM glycoprotein produced by stromal fibroblasts
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase characteristic of fibroblasts/keratocytes
SFRP4 is a Wnt pathway modulator expressed in mesenchymal/stromal cells
Apolipoprotein D is highly expressed in quiescent corneal keratocytes
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in stromal/mesenchymal cells
Parvalbumin is a calcium-binding protein marking specific retinal neurons (e.g., horizontal or amacrine cells)

Calbindin is a calcium-binding protein expressed in retinal horizontal cells
ONECUT3 cooperates with ONECUT2 in horizontal cell development
NDRG4 is expressed in retinal neurons including horizontal cells
TFAP2B is a transcription factor involved in retinal horizontal and amacrine cell differentiation
GRIA4 is a glutamate receptor subunit expressed in retinal horizontal cells
PROX1 is a transcription factor marking horizontal and bipolar cells in the retina
MEG3 is a long non-coding RNA expressed in stromal/mesenchymal cells
NFKBIZ is an NF-kB pathway regulator involved in inflammatory signaling in stromal cells

FOSB is an immediate early gene indicating transcriptionally active/stimulated stromal cells
CDKN1A (p21) is a cell cycle inhibitor suggesting quiescent or stress-responsive cells
NR4A1 is an immediate early gene/nuclear receptor in activated stromal cells
TCF4 is a transcription factor expressed in corneal endothelial and stromal cells
Dopachrome tautomerase is a melanogenic enzyme specific to melanocytes
PMEL (gp100) is a melanosome structural protein and definitive melanocyte marker
Tyrosinase-related protein 1 is a melanin biosynthesis enzyme specific to melanocytes
MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte differentiation antigen and canonical marker
MITF is the master transcription factor of melanocyte lineage
Endothelin receptor B is critical for melanocyte development and survival
TRPM1 is a melanocyte-specific ion channel regulated by MITF
GPNMB is a melanosome-associated glycoprotein expressed in melanocytes
IGFBP5 is highly expressed in stromal fibroblasts
Decorin is a hallmark proteoglycan of corneal keratocytes/stromal fibroblasts
Matrix Gla protein is expressed in mesenchymal/stromal cells
MMP2 is a matrix metalloproteinase produced by stromal fibroblasts
ANGPTL7 is expressed in corneal stromal keratocytes and trabecular meshwork
IL33 is an alarmin cytokine expressed by stromal/mesenchymal cells
PRRX1 is a homeobox transcription factor marking mesenchymal/fibroblast cells

IFITM1 is an interferon-stimulated gene expressed in activated stromal cells
C1QA is a complement component highly expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
C1QB is a complement gene characteristic of macrophages
MHC class II is highly expressed on antigen-presenting macrophages
AIF1 (IBA1) is a canonical macrophage/microglia marker
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for myeloid cell signaling
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed in myeloid cells
CCL3 (MIP-1α) is a chemokine produced by activated macrophages
IL1B is a pro-inflammatory cytokine produced by activated macrophages
SPP1 (osteopontin) is highly expressed in activated/inflammatory macrophages
RNASE1 is expressed in tissue-resident macrophages
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of monocytes and inflammatory myeloid cells
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8 in inflammatory monocytes
MHC class II is highly expressed on antigen-presenting myeloid cells
FCER1G is an Fc receptor signaling component in myeloid cells
TYROBP is a myeloid signaling adaptor protein
LST1 is expressed in monocytes and dendritic cells

RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in vascular mural cells

The ribosomal/translation gene enrichment with RGS5 suggests pericytes with high translational activity
PCP2 (L7) is a canonical marker of retinal ON-bipolar cells
